news.headline: Heritage Financial named Top 100 RIA Firm by Forbes for 3rd consecutive year. Based in Boston, independent wealth management.
news.summary: In Westwood, Massachusetts, Heritage Financial Services, an independent wealth management firm based in Boston, has received recognition from Forbes as one of America's Top 100 RIA (Registered Investment Advisor) Firms for the third consecutive year. This marks the firm's third year of being honored with this prestigious award.

news.headline: J.S. Held acquires Stapleton Group, launches Strategic Advisory practice led by Michael Jacoby, CTP. Celebrating 50 years.
news.summary: In Jericho, New York, on October 10, 2024, J.S. Held, a renowned global consulting firm with 50 years of service, has acquired Stapleton Group. This acquisition marks the establishment of the Strategic Advisory practice led by Michael Jacoby, CTP. Notably, the founding and acquisition were highlighted due to the firms' commitment to transformative practices.

news.headline: ScholarGPS® launches scholarly analytics platform at scholargps.com, offering fully quantitative rankings across 14 fields and 177 disciplines.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, ScholarGPS®, a scholarly analytics platform developed by scholars, has officially launched to the public at scholargps.com. This platform provides quantitative rankings for scholars, research institutions, universities, and academic programs. ScholarGPS evaluates these rankings in 14 fields and 177 disciplines, including Medicine, Engineering, and Humanities. This launch marks the introduction of the first comprehensive quantitative ranking system in the academic sector.

news.headline: Renowned chef Barbara Lynch will shut down all her restaurants following reports of workplace abuse. Employees voice concerns.
news.summary: She played a significant role in elevating her city's culinary scene to a modern standard. However, numerous employees have come forward with complaints of workplace abuse that they endured during their time working with her.

news.headline: Farther raises $72M in Series C from CapitalG and Viewpoint Ventures. AUM grows 5x yoy to $5B. Expanding tech-driven wealth management.
news.summary: Farther, a prominent technology-focused financial advisory firm, experienced a remarkable surge in its Assets Under Management (AUM) exceeding 5 times the figure reported in the previous year, now surpassing $5 billion. This growth prompted the closure of a noteworthy $72 million Series C funding round aimed at expanding the firm's advisor network and improving its wealth management platform. The fundraising was co-led by...

news.headline: NRP Group and JPS Health Network to Develop 67-unit community in Dallas-Fort Worth, 60 units for low-income residents.
news.summary: A new mixed-income multifamily development in Fort Worth, Texas has reached a successful financial closing. The project, a partnership between The NRP Group and JPS Health Network, comprises 67 units. Sixty of these units will be allocated for individuals earning 30, 50, and 60 percent of the Area Median Income (AMI), while the remaining seven will be market-rate. The development will feature additional amenities, including a 2,200 square foot communal space.

news.headline: Gigi Pip & Two Roads Hat Co. to open flagship store at Nashville Yards in March 2025, announced by Southwest Value Partners.
news.summary: Today, Southwest Value Partners revealed that two popular hat brands, Gigi Pip and Two Roads Hat Co., are set to launch a flagship store at Nashville Yards in March 2025. This move signifies a significant development for the area, indicating growth and potential business opportunities. The store's opening is expected to attract a considerable number of customers and boost the local economy.

news.headline: Anthony Pompliano's Bitcoin price prediction of $100,000 within 2.5 years failed, teaching him humility; remains optimistic for Bitcoin's future.
news.summary: Anthony Pompliano, co-founder of Morgan Creek Digital and a prominent Bitcoin proponent, had a humbling moment in 2022 when his prediction of Bitcoin reaching $100,000 in 2.5 years fell short, with the asset only rising sixfold. Despite this, Pompliano remained confident in Bitcoin's potential, affirming his continued investments and expressing a renewed bullish outlook for 2023. He acknowledged the unpredictability of market predictions but reiterated his belief in the crypto industry's resilience. Pompliano will be a keynote speaker at Benzinga's Future of Digital Assets event, emphasizing his enduring commitment to Bitcoin.

news.headline: Valve positioner market set to reach USD 2.63 billion by 2033 due to increasing demand in developing economies.
news.summary: The article discusses the importance and function of valve positioners in regulating the precise position of valves in industrial process control systems. Valve positioners help control the flow of fluids such as gases and liquids to maintain specified parameters. The global market for valve positioners is driven by increasing urbanization and industrialization in developing economies like China, India, Brazil, and South Africa. Demand for valve positioners is rising in sectors like energy, pharmaceuticals, and chemicals. The article also mentions advancements in valve positioner technology, with companies like PMV developing sophisticated digital positioners. The global urban population is projected to reach 6.7 billion by 2050, with significant growth expected in Asia and Africa.

news.headline: Keysight introduces portable 800GE benchtop system to test AI and data center interconnects in Santa Rosa, California.
news.summary: In Santa Rosa, California, a leading company has launched a new portable benchtop system specifically designed for testing artificial intelligence and data center interconnects. This innovative system, known as 800GE, offers advanced capabilities in a compact and easily transportable form. Keysight's latest offering aims to meet the growing demand for efficient testing solutions in this rapidly evolving field.

news.headline: Nanobots in Healthcare Market valued at USD 7.1 Billion in 2023, expected to grow at 8.6% CAGR during 2025-2030.
news.summary: Dublin--A report on the global nanobots in healthcare market has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market was valued at USD 7.1 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 8.6% during 2025-2030. The nanorobots in healthcare sector has experienced significant growth recently, attributed to advancements in technology.

news.headline: 6sense hosts Breakthrough 2024 in Las Vegas with 1,200 attendees, focuses on AI use in B2B revenue.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, 6sense® organized Breakthrough 2024, gathering over 1,200 sales and marketing leaders to explore AI technology's role in boosting B2B revenue generation. The event highlighted the collaborative spirit among professionals, fostering a setting for knowledge exchange and inspiring discussions on innovative business strategies. According to organizers, Breakthrough 2024 exemplified the enthusiasm and inventiveness of revenue experts as they shared successes and insights, emphasizing the power of collective learning and networking.

news.headline: AuthenticID named "Overall Fraud Prevention Solution Provider of the Year" in 2024 CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards.
news.summary: Seattle - AuthenticID, a prominent company in the field of identity verification and fraud prevention, was revealed as the recipient of the "Overall Fraud Prevention Solution Provider of the Year" award in the 8th annual CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards. These awards are managed by CyberSecurity Breakthrough, a respected independent market intelligence organization that celebrates outstanding companies, technologies, and products in the worldwide information security sector.

news.headline: Astrion appoints new executives after acquiring Axient, aiming to enhance innovation and growth. Dave Zolet stays as CEO.
news.summary: A company specializing in mission support and engineering services for the U.S. government, Astrion, has unveiled a new executive leadership team today in Washington. This development comes after the acquisition of Axient and is set to enhance the firm's ability to provide innovative solutions to customers. Dave Zolet, an experienced figure in the industry, will carry on as the Chief Executive Officer of Astrion. The collaboration with Axient solidifies Astrion's distinctive standing in the sector, underscoring its commitment to delivering top-notch services.

news.headline: US to sell $81 bln 3-month bills on October 15, to settle on October 17.
Uniswap's price surged 11.91% to $8.03 in 24 hours, continuing a positive trend with a 23.0% gain in the past week. All-time high at $44.92.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of Uniswap (CRYPTO: UNI) has increased by 11.91% to reach $8.03. This growth is part of a larger positive trend seen over the past week, with a total gain of 23.0% from $6.47. Uniswap's all-time high is $44.92. For a detailed look at the price movement and volatility of Uniswap, kindly refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Free Rein Coffee and Stetson launch 'Cowboy Coffee Kit' for Holiday 2024, available online and at National Finals Rodeo in San Angelo, Texas. Limited supplies.
news.summary: Customers can now purchase the collaborative products on the websites of both retailers, at various HTeaO stores, and at a special Stetson X Free Rein pop-up during the National Finals Rodeo in December. The items will be available for purchase while supplies last. This partnership announcement was made in San Angelo, Texas on October 10, 2024, by Free Rein Coffee Company. The company is recognized for its commitment to 'Honest. American...'.

news.headline: Fed’s Williams: The economy is solid, labor market in a good place.
Best Egg secures $500m purchase facility led by Fortress Investment Group & Edge Focus, to expand personal loan offers.
news.summary: Fortress Investment Group, in collaboration with Edge Focus, is spearheading a forward-flow and back-book purchase commitment for Best Egg. The company disclosed obtaining a $500 million agreement aimed at bolstering the expansion of its personal loan offering. This move signifies a significant step towards enhancing Best Egg's financial standing and reaching a broader customer base. The commitment from Fortress Investment Group and Edge Focus highlights the confidence in Best Egg's potential for growth and success in the personal loan market.

news.headline: US to sell $72 bln 6-month bills on October 15, to settle on October 17.
USPS releases Winter Whimsy stamps with 4 symmetrical snowflake designs to celebrate winter.
news.summary: Park City, Utah - On October 10, 2024, the Winter Whimsy stamps were released by the U.S. Postal Service, showcasing four lacy symmetrical images inspired by snowflakes. These eye-catching designs mark the transition from fall to winter, highlighting the beauty of winter with intricate details. The set features four unique designs that capture the stunning symmetry of snowflakes.

news.headline: Microsoft launches AI capabilities in healthcare sector; enhances care, collaboration, and insights.
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington on October 10, 2024, Microsoft Corp is set to reveal multiple advancements in Microsoft Cloud for Healthcare. These innovations aim to improve care experiences, boost team collaboration, support healthcare workers, and provide valuable clinical and operational insights. This unveiling is part of Microsoft's ongoing efforts to enhance the healthcare industry through technology.

news.headline: Highland Electric Fleets & GRID Alternatives join for a training program aimed at electric school bus operations.
news.summary: In Beverley, Massachusetts, and Oakland, California, on October 10, 2024, Highland Electric Fleets, a prominent provider of Electrification-as-a-Service (EaaS) for school bus and municipal fleets, announced a partnership with GRID Alternatives. This collaboration aims to establish a specialized workforce development training program.

news.headline: JLL Income Property Trust sells Chicago West Loop apartment tower as part of reinvestment strategy amidst new market cycle.
news.summary: At the commencement of a new market cycle, JLL Income Property Trust in Chicago is strategically planning to reinvest. The institutionally-managed daily NAV REIT, listed on NASDAQ as ZIPTAX, ZIPTMX, ZIPIAX, and ZIPIMX, holds a substantial portfolio amounting to around $6.5 billion in equity and debt investments.

news.headline: Vitestro appoints Dave Hickey, former BD Executive, to Board of Directors for autonomous blood drawing device.
news.summary: In Utrecht, Netherlands on October 10, 2024, Vitestro, known for creating the first autonomous blood drawing device, has appointed Dave Hickey to its Board of Directors. Hickey, former Executive VP and President of BD's Life Sciences Segment, brings his expertise to the company. This innovative device revolutionizes medical procedures and has garnered global attention.

news.headline: Inventor from Ontario develops therapeutic device combining heat and massage for pain relief.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on October 10, 2024, an inventor from Harrowsmith, Ontario, Canada shared the inspiration behind his creation, the Ultimate Martin Therapy. The inventor expressed the goal of providing a convenient and comfortable solution to apply heat and massage to different body areas, aiming to relieve pain and soreness. This innovative therapy system is designed to offer relaxation and relief, combining heat and massage techniques. The Ultimate Martin Therapy is specifically designed to target various body areas and aid in alleviating discomfort.

news.headline: Fannie Mae transfers $160.9M in mortgage credit risk in its sixth transaction of 2024, totaling $6.4B on single-family loans.
news.summary: Fannie Mae revealed on October 10, 2024, that it has completed a fresh Credit Insurance Risk Transfer™ (CIRT™) deal. The CIRT 2024-H3 transaction involved shifting $160.9 million in mortgage credit risk to private insurers and reinsurers. The company expressed gratitude for the backing received.

news.headline: GIGABYTE introduces AORUS Z890 motherboards with AI-enhanced innovations for Intel® Core™ Ultra processors. #Technology #GIGABYTE #AORUS #Intel
news.summary: In Taipei on October 10, 2024, GIGABYTE, a top computer brand, revealed the release of the AORUS Z890 series motherboards. This new lineup includes the innovative D5 Bionic Corsa, featuring AI-enhanced advancements in software, hardware, and more.

news.headline: Law firm investigates shareholder claims against FlexShopper, Inc. (NASDAQ: FPAY) for fiduciary duty breach.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on October 10, 2024, Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP stated that they are conducting an investigation into FlexShopper, Inc. (NASDAQ: FPAY) to represent the interests of the company's shareholders. The investigation is aimed at assessing whether the directors of FlexShopper failed to fulfill their fiduciary responsibilities in relation to the company.

news.headline: CHPW donates $250,000 to support local organizations advancing health equity in Washington State, benefiting BIPOC communities.
news.summary: In 2024, a total of unspecified number of grants will be distributed to various community-based organizations throughout Washington State. These organizations cater to immigrant, refugee, LGBTQ+, and BIPOC communities. The grants are being provided by Community Health Plan of Washington (CHPW), a not-for-profit organization that offers Apple Health (Medicaid) and Medicare services. This initiative aims to support and empower underserved communities in the state. The announcement was made on October 10, 2024, in Seattle.

news.headline: Logistics automation market to reach $85.19 billion by 2030 from $35.21 billion in 2022, with 11.7% CAGR.
news.summary: By 2030, the market size for logistics automation is estimated to grow to US$85.19 billion from US$35.21 billion in 2022, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 11.7% during the period 2022-2030. A recent report by The Insight Partners released on October 10, 2024 in New York highlighted these projections.

news.headline: DoubleDown Interactive to report 2024 third quarter results on Nov 11 at 5:00 p.m. ET, open to public, symbol DDI.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on October 10, 2024, DoubleDown Interactive Co., Ltd. (NASDAQ: DDI), a prominent developer and publisher of digital games on mobile and web platforms, disclosed plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2024. The announcement indicated that the results would be made public after the market closes on Monday, November 11, 2024. Additionally, a conference call and webcast are scheduled for 5:00 p.m. ET (2:00 p.m. PT) on the same day, open to all interested parties. During the event, DoubleDown's management is set to analyze the financial performance, present a business update, and engage in a Q&A session with participants.

news.headline: Verizon donates $50,000 to help unhoused population in LA County.
news.summary: Financial support has been allocated to assist the homeless population in Los Angeles County. The funding is designed to aid individuals without housing in the county.

news.headline: Karrier One launches Karrier Number System (KNS) on Sui network for enhanced security and convenience. Helps bridge Web2 and Web3 communities.
news.summary: In Markham, Ontario, Karrier One has unveiled the Karrier Number System (KNS) on the Sui network, introducing a groundbreaking innovation set to revolutionize standards in the industry. The KNS merges account verification, SIM swap protection, and Know Your Customer (KYC) procedures into a unified platform, effectively bridging the gap between Web2 and Web3 communities. Through advanced technology, KNS provides top-notch security and user-friendly experience. This launch marks a significant milestone in enhancing security and user experience. Users can seamlessly access these features on the platform.

news.headline: Fed’s Williams: I see 2024 GDP between 2.25-2.5%, 2.25% average over next two years.
Fed’s Williams: I see unemployment at 4.25% this year and around that in 2025.
Fed’s Williams: I expect inflation to wane to 2.25% this year, close to 2% in 2025.
Urenco installs new centrifuges in US, part of expansion project in Eunice, New Mexico, to increase capacity in 2022.
news.summary: In Eunice, New Mexico, Urenco has successfully added the first new centrifuges as part of a U.S. expansion project. This development is anticipated to enhance capacity by the upcoming year. These centrifuges were integrated into the current centrifuge hall located at Urenco's enrichment site in Eunice. A ceremony at the facility was attended by government officials at the Federal, State, and local levels, Urenco executives, over 500 Urenco USA staff and contractors, and community representatives to commemorate this milestone.

news.headline: Fed’s Williams: Job market unlikely to be inflation driver going forward.
JNH Legal in Arizona designated as one of the first legal paraprofessional firms to address court backlogs and workforce shortages.
news.summary: Introducing JNH Legal, a groundbreaking legal firm in Tucson, Arizona, launched on October 10, 2024. This firm offers a unique concierge model that ensures personalized service for clients seeking affordable legal solutions. In light of growing pressures on the U.S. court system, JNH Legal aims to address this challenge by providing innovative approaches to legal services.

news.headline: Trump praises Vivek Ramaswamy, a crypto advocate, may have key role in administration if elected. Trump impressed by Ramaswamy's capabilities calling him "smart as hell" and "nasty", formerly underestimating him.
news.summary: During a rally on Wednesday, Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump praised cryptocurrency advocate Vivek Ramaswamy and hinted at the possibility of including him in his potential administration. Trump expressed interest in appointing Ramaswamy to a key position, stating that he believed Ramaswamy could outperform anyone else in that role. Despite initially underestimating him as a competitor, Trump commended Ramaswamy as being exceptionally intelligent and formidable. The former president's remarks were made during the rally in Pennsylvania. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Venture Backed launches Founder Community at TechCrunch Disrupt 2024, offering $10,000 giveaway at monthly pitch competitions.
news.summary: A groundbreaking digital platform, Venture Backed, has announced a monthly pitch competition starting in October 2024. The competition includes a $10,000 giveaway and other opportunities for entrepreneurs, investors, and service providers. The platform offers early access to its Founder Community, creating an innovative space for networking and collaboration.

news.headline: Auburn University to launch Doctor of Physical Therapy program in 2025; part of School of Kinesiology.
news.summary: In Auburn, Alabama, on October 10, 2024, it was announced that Auburn University will be introducing its first Doctor of Physical Therapy program in the summer of 2025 as part of National Physical Therapy Month. The program will be located in the School of Kinesiology within the College of Education. This marks an important development for the university as it expands its offerings in the field of physical therapy.

news.headline: AdvoCare® Foundation awards $330,000 in grants to support children and families in need by 2025.
news.summary: In Richardson, Texas, the AdvoCare Foundation has allocated $330,000 in grants towards improving the well-being of children and families residing in underserved communities.

news.headline: FINBOA wins Integrator Award at Jack Henry Connect 2024 for compliance automation. Leading provider for financial institutions.
news.summary: In Houston on October 10, 2024, FINBOA Inc., a prominent company offering intelligent process automation for regulatory compliance in financial institutions, was honored with the Integrator Award at the 2024 Jack Henry event. This award recognizes FINBOA's exceptional compliance process automation solutions. The accolade highlights their dedication to innovation and excellence in this field. This acknowledgment further solidifies FINBOA's position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Stock market volatility surges close to elections with Wall Street's fear index hitting record levels.
MedHQ names Michael Drucker as CFO, bringing 20 years of experience in finance and payor expertise.
news.summary: A highly experienced executive from HCSC/Blue Cross Blue Shield of Illinois has joined MedHQ in Westchester, Illinois, bringing with them more than 20 years of expertise in finance and payor services. MedHQ is a prominent healthcare advisory and administrative solutions provider for hospitals and health systems. The appointment was announced on October 10, 2024, through a press release by PR Newswire.

news.headline: 100 Teamsters Local 238 members at Cargill are on strike, rallying for a fair contract as the largest private company.
news.summary: In Cedar Rapids, Iowa, a rally is scheduled to take place on Oct. 10, 2024, at 4:00 p.m. to show support for 100 Teamsters Local 238 members at Cargill who have initiated a strike. Cargill, the world's largest privately held corporation, is the company involved in the labor dispute with the union.

news.headline: Fastenal to report Q3 earnings, expected at 52 cents/share with revenue of $1.91 billion. August sales $652.65 million, down 2.3%. Stock gained 0.6% to close at $70.61.
news.summary: Fastenal Company is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on Friday, Oct. 11, with analysts predicting earnings of 52 cents per share, steady compared to the same period last year. Revenue is forecasted to increase to $1.91 billion from $1.85 billion in the previous year. As of September 6, the company reported a 2.3% decrease in August sales, reaching $652.65 million. On Wednesday, Fastenal's shares closed at $70.61, marking a 0.6% increase. For further insights, readers can refer to the Benzinga Pro data platform or visit their Analyst Stock Ratings page for the latest analyst assessments.

news.headline: France's construction industry is projected to grow steadily with a CAGR of 2.8% during 2024-2028, supporting economic growth.
news.summary: A report on the France Construction Industry Databook Series has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The construction industry in France is predicted to experience substantial growth, with projections indicating steady expansion over the next four quarters. Furthermore, a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 2.8% is expected during the period of 2024-2028. This growth trend is anticipated to persist throughout the forecast period, suggesting positive developments in the industry's output.
